name: Portugal
style_of_play: Balanced approach blending possession phases with rapid transitions and wide attacking play.
weaknesses: occasional lack of a traditional target striker
tactical_summary: Use a double pivot to protect the back line while fullbacks and wingers provide width. Advanced playmaker links midfield to attack with through balls and late runs into the box.
why_it_matters: Portugal's blend of experience and creative midfielders makes them effective at unlocking low blocks in the second half.
injury_news: Placeholder — squad updates to follow in a later phase.
